title: Ghost IDE 1.1beta
massges:
👻 Ghost IDE v1.1 Beta – The "Spirited" Update is Live!
What's lurking in the new version? 👇

· 🌍🗣️ Global Chatter – Added support for multiple languages! Code without borders.
· ⚡🚀 Turbo Boost – Supercharged app performance. Faster than a ghost in a hurry!
· 📄⚙️ Config Wizard – Brand new Properties file support for all your tweaks.
· 📦🔍 Peek-a-Boo – Built-in ZIP viewer! Browse archives without extracting a thing.
· ✏️🔄 Bulk Boss – Batch rename is here! Rename entire groups in a single click.
· 🐞🧹 Ghostbusting – Squashed translation bugs on specific devices and exorcised plenty of other pesky glitches.

Update now and feel the frightful speed! 👻💾
